items.headline: OpenAI's Fidji Simo takes medical leave, announces leadership changes

items.headline: 'Chasing vibes' — OpenAI's M&A strategy gets more confusing with TBPN purchase

items.headline: How TBPN went from nerdy online talk show to splashy OpenAI acquisition
items.summary: The less “antagonistic” tone of TBPN resonated with a Silicon Valley audience. Now the show is going mainstream.

items.headline: ‘This is an overlooked catastrophe’: Why do so many hospitals not accept Medicare Advantage for cancer patients?

items.summary: It is unclear if the plane was shot down or went down for another reason.

items.headline: ‘I plan to take out a mortgage’: My father died. Should I buy the family home from my mom at a 40% discount?

items.headline: These little-known chip stocks could be winners as SpaceX and Amazon make big satellite pushes

items.headline: Netflix co-founder Reed Hastings has made over $500 million on stock options since last year
items.summary: Netflix co-founder Reed Hastings has made more than half a billion dollars since the end of 2024 converting options into common stock, then selling it.

items.headline: Meta, Google under attack as court cases bypass 30-year-old legal shield
items.summary: Internet platforms have long been able to rely on special protections to avoid liability for what takes place on their sites. But that may be changing.

items.headline: Trump threatens to destroy Iranian infrastructure, saying its government 'knows what has to be done'
items.summary: The threat comes a day after he said in a nationwide address that the U.S. military will be hitting Tehran "extremely hard" for the next two or three weeks.

items.headline: I study happiness for a living: The most emotionally secure people share these 7 'quietly powerful' traits

items.headline: U.S. payrolls rose by 178,000 in March, more than expected; unemployment at 4.3%

items.headline: The cost to fly private is up as much as 20% with fuel prices soaring

items.headline: These master's degrees lead to fast-growing, in-demand jobs—but offer low ROI
items.summary: Getting a master's degrees in social work and psychology may not deliver the best return on investment. But job placement and fulfillment may come easier.

items.headline: United Airlines hikes checked bag fee by $10 as fuel prices continue to climb

items.headline: United unveils basic Polaris business fare in premium cabin overhaul

items.headline: Trump tariff fallout: Some industries grapple with lingering effects one year later

items.headline: Asia-Pacific markets mostly rise in Easter trade on hopes for Hormuz reopening
items.summary: South Korea's Kospi led gains in the region while Japan's Nikkei 225 also opened higher. The Australian and Hong Kong markets were closed for the Easter weekend.

items.headline: Japan's Sakura Internet jumps 20% as Microsoft plans $10 billion AI push with SoftBank
items.summary: Microsoft said it plans to invest $10 billion in Japan between 2026 and 2029 to build AI infrastructure.

items.headline: Chinese chip firms hit record high revenue driven by the AI boom and U.S. curbs

items.headline: Tiger Woods called Trump after DUI crash, he told cop on bodycam video

items.headline: Coinbase clears key regulatory hurdle in bid to bolster its stablecoin business

items.headline: Trump administration sets up to 100% tariffs on some imported drugs, with many companies exempt

items.headline: Trump fires Attorney General Pam Bondi
items.summary: President Trump was said to be unhappy with Pam Bondi's handling of DOJ files about Jeffrey Epstein and the DOJ's failure to prosecute his political enemies.

items.headline: Tesla's stock suffers steepest drop of 2026 on disappointing deliveries report
items.summary: Tesla is coming off a year of declining deliveries due in part to increased competition from rivals in China offering lower-cost models.

items.headline: CFTC sues Arizona, Connecticut, Illinois over prediction market regulation
items.summary: The Commodity Futures Trading Commission said it was suing Arizona, Connecticut and Illinois over its ability to exclusively regulate prediction markets.

items.headline: Blue Owl caps private credit funds redemptions at 5% after steep request levels
items.summary: Blue Owl attributed the higher-than-usual requests to "heightened market concerns around AI-related disruption to software companies."

items.headline: Trump's Iran war speech paints a grim picture for oil markets with more than 600 million barrels at risk
